items.title: When An Admin Error Cost A Doctor Months Of Her Career — Dr NA
items.summary: If medical officers are held accountable for non-compliance, then administrative systems and those responsible for them must also be held to a similar standard. This requires meaningful corrective action that reflects the seriousness of the oversight. The post When An Admin Error Cost A Doctor Months Of Her Career — Dr NA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Amend Act 586 Before Launching Base MHIT, Says Gopeng MP
items.summary: Gopeng MP Tan Kar Hing wants the Private Healthcare Facilities and Services Act to be amended first to control private hospital charges beyond doctor fees (facilities, drugs and consumables) and prevent "over-servicing" before launching the Base MHIT plan. The post Amend Act 586 Before Launching Base MHIT, Says Gopeng MP appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Consider Hiring Foreign Doctors As Mitigation Strategy: Kota Melaka MP
items.summary: Kota Melaka MP Khoo Poay Tiong says the prospect of hiring foreign doctors may need to be considered as a short-term mitigation strategy to address dire shortages of housemen and specialists, but standards can't be compromised. Remuneration must be fair. The post Consider Hiring Foreign Doctors As Mitigation Strategy: Kota Melaka MP appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: SPM BM, History Requirements Worsening Housemen Shortage: Doctor
items.summary: A paediatrician wants a re-evaluation of SPM BM and History requirements for medical practice in the public sector, saying this obstacle is preventing students from non-mainstream education pathways from joining housemanship. The post SPM BM, History Requirements Worsening Housemen Shortage: Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: WFH For Civil Servants: Don’t Forget Those Who Can’t Stay Home — Concerned Doctor
items.summary: As health workers, policemen, military personnel, and emergency responders can't work from home, frontline civil servants should get targeted financial incentives and child care support. When flexibility is given to some, fairness must be extended to all. The post WFH For Civil Servants: Don’t Forget Those Who Can’t Stay Home — Concerned Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: JanaVeteran Project Empowers ATM Veterans Through Ginger Farming
items.summary: Boustead Plantations' JanaVeteran project enables Malaysian Armed Forces veterans to cultivate ginger, a high-value cash crop. Participants receive a guaranteed monthly income of RM2,000. Malaysia has low self-sufficiency for ginger at 15%. The post JanaVeteran Project Empowers ATM Veterans Through Ginger Farming appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Johor Government Pays For Locum Doctors At Public Emergency Departments
items.summary: The Johor state government is paying for locum doctor services at the green zone of the emergency departments of HSAJB and HSI to cut congestion and waiting times. Johor exco Ling Tian Soon says most of these locum doctors are existing government doctors. The post Johor Government Pays For Locum Doctors At Public Emergency Departments appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Queen Elizabeth Hospital Facing Overworked Doctors, Ageing Equipment: Luyang Rep
items.summary: After visiting Queen Elizabeth Hospital (QEH), Luyang rep Samuel Wong says QEH is facing ageing equipment, overcrowded facilities, and overworked doctors, reflecting the state's strained health care system. The Warisan rep wants health autonomy for Sabah. The post Queen Elizabeth Hospital Facing Overworked Doctors, Ageing Equipment: Luyang Rep appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Patient, Client, Or Health Care Consumer? — Dr Pearl Leong
items.summary: Nothing can replace the personal medical advice you receive from your own doctor, who knows you and your personal medical history. The post Patient, Client, Or Health Care Consumer? — Dr Pearl Leong appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Day I Quit Medicine — Dr Goh Heong Keong
items.summary: The joy, the intellectual challenge, and the humanitarian core of medicine have been eroded by the weight of liability, leaving only the anxiety and the hollow performance of risk management. The post The Day I Quit Medicine — Dr Goh Heong Keong appeared first on CodeBlue .
